description_long: This is a tall, four-sided stone obelisk with a pointed tip, standing on a roughly circular stone base that is partially surrounded by patches of grass and moss. The obelisk's surface is weathered, showing signs of age and exposure, with visible discoloration and some surface staining. One face of the obelisk features a rectangular plaque or inscription panel, which appears to be made of the same stone material but is slightly recessed. The base is irregular and blends into the surrounding ground, suggesting it is set outdoors, possibly in a park or public square. The overall structure is monolithic, with no visible joints or separations, and the tip is sharply defined. The monument is utilitarian in design, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric simplicity.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with a pointed tip, set on a rough stone base and featuring a recessed inscription panel on one face. The structure is simple, monolithic, and surrounded by patches of grass.
description_view_0: The obelisk is seen from a face without a plaque, showing weathered stone and a triangular profile, with grass and moss at the base.
description_view_1: This view highlights a darker, shadowed face of the obelisk, with the base and surrounding grass more prominent.
description_view_2: The face with the rectangular inscription panel is visible, set into the stone, with the base and ground clearly shown.
description_view_3: A lighter, unadorned face of the obelisk is visible, with the rough stone base and surrounding vegetation evident.
attribute_inscription: A rectangular plaque or inscription panel is visible on one face, but the text is not legible in the images. The style appears to be simple and recessed into the stone.
attribute_base_design: The base is roughly circular, made of the same stone as the obelisk, and is irregular in shape with patches of grass and moss growing around it. There are no steps or decorative features.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is sharply pointed and unadorned, matching the geometric simplicity of the rest of the obelisk.
attribute_surrounding_features: Patches of grass and moss are present around the base, blending the monument into the natural ground. No other notable features are visible.
